name: Mediterranean Stuffed Eggplant
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Feta cheese OR drained cottage cheese
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash the eggplant and cut it in half.
2. Scoop out the pulp, leaving about 1/2 inch of shell intact.
3. Microwave the empty shells for 8 minutes on High until soft.
4. Chop the pulp and sauté it in oil with onion and garlic until tender.
5. Melt margarine in a microwave-safe bowl.
6. Add flour and mix with juice from tomatoes and water to form 1 cup of sauce.
7. Cook until thickened.
8. Add the cooked sauce and canned diced tomatoes to the chopped eggplant.
9. Incorporate oregano or marjoram, pepper, and salt.
10. Fill the shells with the mixture.
11. Top each shell with cheese.
12. Bake at 350°F for 30 minutes. Cover part of the shells during cooking if needed.
